title: polygala lutea
intro: Polygala lutea, also known as American cowheat, is a perennial herb native to North America that belongs to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala lutea include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of Polygala lutea include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make remedies for various health conditions.
